embeds.title: v0.7.0 — the warren turns over (2/3)
embeds.description:
**More room on the bench**
• five bench slots now, up from three — hold a whole merge-trio and change without selling your counter-tech first.

**Relics**
• Glass Shard reworked: the first-hit bonus each wave used to be a flat +3. now it scales with the wave number itself — +1 on wave 1, +45 by wave 45, deliberately left uncapped. late-ride, this relic hits harder than almost anything else you can carry.

**Poison, capped**
• multiple poison-all casters (Blight-Witch, and now Draughtsman Moe) used to stack fully — a few of them on one board could out-rot the whole enemy line hard enough to carry a run on poison alone. capped now: total poison-all stacks per wave top out at what a single tier-3 caster deals. Plague-Bearer gets the same treatment in its own separate cap — stacking either kind alone doesn't multiply anymore, though a Plague-Bearer and a poison-all caster together still out-poison either alone.

**New: Boss Trial**
a second gauntlet, once a day, fixed at 20:00 CET — no clicking to trigger it, your board just fights whatever it's standing as at that hour, same as the hourly ride. a straight DPS check against a boss whose attack escalates hard while its health climbs steadily, scored and ranked on its own leaderboard, with its own replay so you can watch the fight back afterward.

footer.text: we ride at dawn · season resets Monday 06:00 CET
